description: D'Arcy & Kiel 2023 Table S1: row-level OMIM disease-gene table, 278 rows / 243 unique gene symbols. Peer gene set to Raghunath's 168-gene mechanistic backbone (curated-disease-association vs curated-mechanism).
extraction_method: pandas.read_excel(header=2) on data/raw/darcy2023/'Table S1 Bioengineering FINAL.xlsx', Sheet 1.
